updates.heading: R&D Open Reqs Tracker Built by Kebone
bullets: Kebone built a Google Apps Script-based open reqs tracker for all of R&D, inspired by Brandon's PM tracker
Auto-updates daily at 9am — should reflect current state each morning
JD tracker section needs manual updates; Kebone plans to tackle that later this week

updates.heading: Kebone Requested Engineering HC Doc Access (Data Eng Historical Data)
bullets: Kebone requested access to the R&D Engineering Hiring Committee feedback doc
Purpose: deep dive into historical Data Engineering role signal and feedback
Flagged in #r-and-d-invite-leadership June 17 — follow up to confirm access was granted

updates.heading: Talent Market Signal: Robinhood Cutting ~300 Roles
bullets: Robinhood announced a restructuring cutting nearly 300 roles
Could surface engineering and product talent — worth monitoring for passive sourcing on active R&D reqs
